Protocols & Placement Guidelin... How to Use FlexBeam to Boost Your Immunity
How to Use FlexBeam to Boost Your Immunity If you haven’t already, read FlexBeam Applications and Usage and How to Use Your FlexBeam before proceeding. It will take you only 20 minutes a day to boost your immunity using FlexBeam. You will be using two types of sessions interchangeably. One day, you should use Session A, and the next day, you should use Session B. That means your session timetable should look something like this: Day 1
Session A Day 2
Session B Day 3
Session A Day 4
Session B and so on...
and so on... Mind FlexBeam placement, program, and the duration of each session. Continue with alternating sessions for 3 weeks and then stop using it for a couple of days before resuming. Now, let’s see what those sessions consist of. Session A for Immunity Boost For Session A, use the FlexBeam program DUAL (2) and place FlexBeam across your stomach vertically for 10 minutes. After that, place your FlexBeam horizontally across your abdomen for 10 minutes. Your session will last a total of 20 minutes. Hi, need help? Hi, need help? Buy now
